sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62664" key="leukodi/fqeros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λευκο-δίφθερος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n62664.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a white skin</tr_>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
